["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["本镜像推荐与",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../hackage/","children":"Hackage 镜像"}],"配合使用。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack--v251","children":"stack >= v2.5.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\config.yaml"}],"）, 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"yaml"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["此外，还需要手动下载 global-hints.yaml（参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../github-raw/","children":"GitHub RAW 帮助"}]," 中 stackage global-hints-cache.yaml 一节）到 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/pantry/global-hints-cache.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\pantry\global-hints-cache.yaml"}],"）。注意文件名不同。这是由于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"stack"}]," 暂时不支持配置该文件的上游地址。该文件需要在每当第一次用到新版本的 GHC 时更新。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack--v231","children":"stack >= v2.3.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\config.yaml"}],"）, 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"yaml"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack--v211","children":"stack >= v2.1.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\config.yaml"}],"）, 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"yaml"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack-小于-v211","children":"stack 小于 v2.1.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\config.yaml"}],"）, 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"yaml"}]]}]
